base.text: The observatory dome has collapsed inward, but the concrete base is intact. A reinforced door stands half-open, jammed on melted glass that pooled into the doorframe.

choices.label: Force the door open the rest of the way.

instrument_room.text: The main instrument room is half-buried in fused glass that poured through a collapsed skylight. One workbench is clear. A locked cabinet against the far wall is undamaged.

deep_storage.text: Behind the cabinet, a sealed storage closet. Pre-war research equipment, wrapped carefully. Someone expected to return.

door_shard.text: A glass fragment the size of your fist shears off as the door gives. It catches your forearm.

chemical_vial.text: A pressurized vial inside the cabinet ruptures. Acrid smoke burns your throat and eyes.
